headline: A Look At TransDigm Group (TDG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Why TransDigm Group (TDG) Is Back on Investors’ Radar TransDigm Group (TDG) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price pressure, with the stock down about 3% over the past month and about 7% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for TransDigm Group. At a latest share price of US$1,201.40, TransDigm Group has seen short term share price pressure with the 90 day share price return down 7.3%. However, the 5 year total shareholder return of 145.99% shows that longer term...

headline: 3 Quality Compounders to Research Further
summary: Quality compounders are flywheels. Said differently, they’re businesses that generate heaps of profits and consistently reinvest them to produce even more profits. Rinse and repeat.
